Part.Source: Event Start RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon207_CidadePadraoPrestacao, &TCon207_CidadePadraoPrestacao) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon208_TipoLctPadraoNFSe, &Varchar) &TCon208_TipoLctPadraoNFSe = val(&Varchar) tbRTB.Visible = 0 txtAliqRBT.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) &CnaedtaHorUltMod = ymDtoD(year(serverdate()), month(serverdate()), 1) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) dpFilialAcesso.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, &SdtFilialAcesso) for &SdtFilialAcessoItem in &SdtFilialAcesso &NewNfsFilCod.AddItem(&SdtFilialAcessoItem.PesFilAce, &SdtFilialAcessoItem.PesFilAceNom) EndFor prcRetornaNotaEmitida.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &NfsCod, &Mensagem) &UpdateUser.Visible = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UnnamedTable9.Width = 400 UnnamedTable34.Width = 50 UnnamedTable32.Width = 35 UnnamedTable31.Width = 50 UnnamedTable29.Width = 35 UnnamedTable28.Width = 50 UnnamedTable26.Width = 35 UnnamedTable25.Width = 50 UnnamedTable23.Width = 35 UnnamedTable22.Width = 50 UnnamedTable20.Width = 35 UnnamedTable19.Width = 50 UnnamedTable17.Width = 35 UnnamedTable16.Width = 50 UnnamedTable14.Width = 35 UnnamedTable13.Width = 50 UnnamedTable11.Width = 35 UnnamedTable69.Width = 140 UnnamedTable71.Width = 120 Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &NfsTotBasCofins.Visible = False &NfsTotBasPIS.Visible = False &SolCod.Visible = False &NfsPrsCidCod.Visible = False &PedCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ do 'loadServico' do 'AtivaInativa' if &NfsTipNF <> 'S' do 'loadCNAE' do 'loadCnaeServico' Else do 'TipoServico' do 'Nbs' Endif do 'TotalizaNota' padraousuarioHora.Call('L', '#ISSRETIDO#', &NfsCliCod, &EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMOd, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') &NfsRetISS = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 1, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetCofins = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 2, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetIR = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 3, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetCPP = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 4, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetPIS = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 5, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetINSS = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 6, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetCSLL = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 7, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetOut = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 8, 1) = '1', true, false) EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //Code block: LoadWWPContext LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridPageCount = grid.PageCount &GridCurrentPage = grid.currentPage EndEvent Event Grid.Load if &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.ProCod.IsEmpty() &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.ProCod = NfsItmProCod &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.ProGraCod = NfsItmProGraCod EndIf if not NfsItmProCod.IsEmpty() &ProCod = NfsItmProCod do 'getCodigoProduto' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &UpdateUser = !'' &DeleteUser = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoCancelarEmBaixo' do 'Sair' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DobtnPadraoRetido' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnbtnPadraoRetido.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnbtnPadraoRetido.Close If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnbtnPadraoRetido.Result = !'Yes' if &NfsRetISS = true or &NfsRetCofins = true or &NfsRetIR = true or &NfsRetCPP = true or &NfsRetPIS = true or &NfsRetINSS = true or &NfsRetCSLL = true or &NfsRetOut = true &PadObs = iif(&NfsRetISS = true, '1', '0') &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetCofins = true , '1', '0') &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetIR = true , '1', '0') &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetCPP = true , '1', '0') &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetPIS = true , '1', '0') &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetINSS = true , '1', '0') &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetCSLL = true , '1', '0') &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetOut = true, '1', '0') padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#ISSRETIDO#', &NfsCliCod, &EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMOd, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') Else padraousuarioHora.Call('X', '#ISSRETIDO#', &NfsCliCod, &EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMOd, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') Endif Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //Ask If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnbtnPadraoRetido.Result = !'Yes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DobtnAplicarTaxa' do 'aplicataxapadrao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserAction1' For Each ORder EmpCod, CnaeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CnaeCod = &NfsCNAE CNAE.Popup(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, CnaeCod) wpselecionadadosnfse.Link(&DeOndeVem, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &NfsCod) Exit When none msg('Informe CNAE!') &NfsCNAE.SetFocus() EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DobtnPadraoRetido1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnbtnPadraoRetido1.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnbtnPadraoRetido1.Close If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnbtnPadraoRetido.Result = !'Yes' &PadObs = &NfsRetISSNov.ToString() &PadObs += &NfsRetPisCofins.ToString() // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetIR = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetCPP = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetPIS = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetINSS = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetCSLL = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetOut = true, '1', '0') padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#ISSRETIDO#', &NfsCliCod, &EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMOd, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //Ask If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnbtnPadraoRetido1.Result = !'Yes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoCancelar' do 'Sair' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult AND not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SalvarDados' prcValidacoesNFSe.call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod, &IsErro, &erroMensagem) //JDF retirei pois pediram para salvar no botao em tela. // if &NfsRetISS = true or &NfsRetCofins = true or &NfsRetIR = true or &NfsRetCPP = true or &NfsRetPIS = true or &NfsRetINSS = true or &NfsRetCSLL = true or &NfsRetOut = true // &PadObs = iif(&NfsRetISS = true, '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetCofins = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetIR = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetCPP = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetPIS = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetINSS = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetCSLL = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetOut = true, '1', '0') // padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#ISSRETIDO#', &NfsCliCod, &EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMOd, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') // Else // padraousuarioHora.Call('X', '#ISSRETIDO#', &NfsCliCod, &EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMOd, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') // Endif if &IsErro = false //sem erro prcNotaServicoTransmitida.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod) GeraXmlNFSe.Call(&EmpCod, &NewNfsFilCod, &NfsCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) wpsNFSRecepcao.Link(&DeOndeVem, &EmpCod, &NfsCod, &SolCod) Else msg(&erroMensagem) Endif EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'CheckRequiredFields' if &NfsTipNF <> 'S' do 'loadCNAE' do 'loadCnaeServico' Else do 'TipoServico' do 'Nbs' Endif &NfsDisSer = upper(&NfsDisSer) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &NewNfsFilCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Filial'), DVMessageType.error, &NewNfsFilCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsLctCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Operação'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsLctCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsCliCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Tomador'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsCliCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&NfsIntIs = true) AND &NfsIntCliCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Intermediário'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsIntCliCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsPrsCidCodNom.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'Cidade Prestação', DVMessageType.error, &NfsPrsCidCodNom.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&NfsTipNF = 'S') AND &NfsTribNac.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Serviço'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsTribNac.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&NfsTipNF = 'S') AND &NfsNbs.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Codigo NBS'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsNbs.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&NfsTipNF = 'S') AND &NfsDisSerNacional.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Discriminação do Serviço'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsDisSerNacional.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&NfsTipNF <> 'S') AND &NfsCNAE.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','CNAE '), DVMessageType.error, &NfsCNAE.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&NfsTipNF <> 'S') AND &NfsCnaeSer.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Serviço'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsCnaeSer.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&NfsTipNF <> 'S') AND &NfsDisSer.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Discriminação do Serviço'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsDisSer.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If (&NfsPerISS > 5 or &NfsPerISS < 2) and &NfsTipNF <> 'S' Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'Alíquota ISS Deve estar entre 2% e 5%', DVMessageType.error, &NfsPerISS.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf if &IsErroCnae = true and &NfsTipNF <> 'S' Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'CNAE Inativo ou não Localizado!', DVMessageType.error, &NfsCNAE.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = false Endif if &IsErroCnaeServico = true and &NfsTipNF <> 'S' Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'Serviço Inativo ou não Localizado!', DVMessageType.error, &NfsCnaeSer.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = false Endif if &IsErroTipoServico = true and &NfsTipNF = 'S' &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = false Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', &TipSerNom, DVMessageType.error, &NfsTribNac.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) Endif if &IsErroNBS = true and &NfsTipNF = 'S' &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = false Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', &NcmObs, DVMessageType.error, &NfsNbs.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) Endif EndSub Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If &NfsTipNF <> 'S' NfsDisSer_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else NfsDisSer_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If &NfsTipNF <> 'S' NfsCnaeSer_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else NfsCnaeSer_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If &NfsTipNF <> 'S' NfsCNAE_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else NfsCNAE_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If &NfsTipNF = 'S' NfsDisSerNacional_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else NfsDisSerNacional_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If &NfsTipNF = 'S' NfsNbs_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else NfsNbs_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If &NfsTipNF = 'S' NfsTribNac_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else NfsTribNac_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If &NfsIntIs = true NfsIntCliCodMT_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell' Else NfsIntCliCodMT_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (not &Mensagem.IsEmpty()) &Mensagem.Visible = False Mensagem_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &Mensagem.Visible = True Mensagem_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 CellAttributeRed' EndIf If Not (not &PedCliObs.IsEmpty()) &PedCliObs.Visible = False PedCliObs_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &PedCliObs.Visible = True PedCliObs_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 CellAttributeRed' EndIf If Not (not &PedObsGer.IsEmpty()) &PedObsGer.Visible = False PedObsGer_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &PedObsGer.Visible = True PedObsGer_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 CellAttributeRed' EndIf If Not (not &PedObsEst.IsEmpty()) &PedObsEst.Visible = False PedObsEst_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &PedObsEst.Visible = True PedObsEst_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 CellAttributeRed' EndIf If &Mensagem.Visible = False AND &PedCliObs.Visible = False AND &PedObsGer.Visible = False AND &PedObsEst.Visible = False tbavisos.Visible = False EndIf tbDadosServicNac.Visible = (&NfsTipNF = 'S') tbEmissaoOld.Visible = (&NfsTipNF <> 'S') tbNovosIMpostos.Visible = (&NfsTipNF = 'S') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &NfsPerISS_Nac.ControlValueChanged do 'TotalizaCampos' EndEvent Event &NfsPerPIS_Nac.ControlValueChanged do 'TotalizaCampos' EndEvent Event &NfsPrsCidCodNom.IsValid &NfsPrsCidCod.SetEmpty() &CodigoCidade.SetEmpty() &NomeCidade =&NfsPrsCidCodNom do 'loadCidadeNome' &NfsPrsCidCod = &CodigoCidade do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndEvent Event &NewNfsFilCod.IsValid if &NfsTipNF <> 'S' do 'loadCNAE' do 'loadCnaeServico' do 'aplicataxapadrao' Else do 'TipoServico' do 'Nbs' Endif if &TCon207_CidadePadraoPrestacao <> 'C' //Diferente do cliente do 'cidadeFilial' Endif EndEvent Event &NfsCliCod.IsValid do 'GetCliente' EndEvent Event &NfsCNAE.IsValid do 'loadCNAE' EndEvent Event &NfsCnaeSer.IsValid do 'loadCnaeServico' EndEvent Event &NfsIntIs.IsValid do 'AtivaInativa' EndEvent Event &DeleteUser.Click prcRemoveItem.Call(EmpCod, NfsCod, NfsItmCod) Grid.Refresh() do 'TotalizaNota' do 'getDadosNotaNacional' EndEvent Event &NfsPerISS.ControlValueChanged if &NfsPerISS > 0 and &NfsTotSer > 0 &NfsTotISS = &NfsTotSer * (&NfsPerISS/100) Else &NfsTotISS = 0 Endif EndEvent Event &NfsPerCofins.ControlValueChanged if &NfsPerCofins > 0 and &NfsTotSer > 0 &NfsTotCofins = &NfsTotSer * (&NfsPerCofins/100) Else &NfsTotCofins = 0 Endif EndEvent Event &NfsPerIR.ControlValueChanged if &NfsPerIR > 0 and &NfsTotSer > 0 &NfsTotIR = &NfsTotSer * (&NfsPerIR/100) Else &NfsTotIR = 0 Endif EndEvent Event &NfsPerCPP.ControlValueChanged if &NfsPerCPP > 0 and &NfsTotSer > 0 &NfsTotCPP = &NfsTotSer * (&NfsPerCPP/100) Else &NfsTotCPP = 0 Endif EndEvent Event &NfsPerPIS.ControlValueChanged if &NfsPerPIS > 0 and &NfsTotSer > 0 &NfsTotPIS = &NfsTotSer * (&NfsPerPIS/100) Else &NfsTotPIS = 0 Endif EndEvent Event &NfsPerINSS.ControlValueChanged if &NfsPerINSS > 0 and &NfsTotSer > 0 &NfsTotINSS = &NfsTotSer * (&NfsPerINSS/100) Else &NfsTotINSS = 0 Endif EndEvent Event &NfsPerCSLL.ControlValueChanged if &NfsPerCSLL > 0 and &NfsTotSer > 0 &NfsTotCSLL = &NfsTotSer * (&NfsPerCSLL/100) Else &NfsTotCSLL = 0 Endif EndEvent Event &NfsPerOut.ControlValueChanged if &NfsPerOut > 0 and &NfsTotSer > 0 &NfsTotOut = &NfsTotSer * (&NfsPerOut/100) Else &NfsTotOut = 0 Endif EndEvent Event &NfsCstPisCofins.IsValid tbAliquotasPisCofins.Visible = (&NfsCstPisCofins <> PisCofinsServico.CST00) EndEvent Event &NfsTotDesc_Nac.ControlValueChanged do 'TotalizaServico' EndEvent Event &NfsTribNac.ControlValueChanged do 'TipoServico' if not &TipSerNbsPad.IsEmpty() &NfsNbs = &TipSerNbsPad do 'Nbs' Endif EndEvent Event &NfsNbs.IsValid do 'Nbs' EndEvent Sub 'getDadosNotaNacional' For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod &NfsTribNac = NfsTribNac &NfsNbs = NfsNbs &NfsDisSerNacional = NfsDisSer &NfsItmValTot = NfsTotSer Exit EndFor do 'TipoServico' if not &TipSerNbsPad.IsEmpty() and &NfsNbs.IsEmpty() &NfsNbs = &TipSerNbsPad Endif do 'Nbs' EndSub Sub 'getCodigoProduto' For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &ProCod &NfsItmProGraRef = ProRef Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'TotalizaCampos' &BasePisCofinsMoeda = &NfsTotSer_Nac - &NfsTotDesc_Nac &NfsTotISS_Nac = round(&NfsPerISS_Nac * &BasePisCofinsMoeda * 0.01 ,2) &NfsTotCofins_Nac = round(&NfsPerCofins_Nac * &BasePisCofinsMoeda * 0.01 ,2) &NfsTotPIS_Nac = round(&NfsPerPIS_Nac * &BasePisCofinsMoeda * 0.01 ,2) EndSub Sub 'getCidade' &NomeCidade.SetEmpty() if &NfsPrsCidCod > 0 For each Order EmpCod,CidCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CidCod = &NfsPrsCidCod &NomeCidade = CidCodNomUfe Exit EndFor &NfsPrsCidCodNom = &NomeCidade Endif EndSub Sub 'cidadeFilial' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &NewNfsFilCod &NfsPrsCidCod = FilCidCod do 'getCidade' exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'loadCidadeNome' if not &NomeCidade.IsEmpty() For each Order EmpCod,CidCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CidCodNomUfe like &NomeCidade when not &NomeCidade.IsEmpty() &CodigoCidade = CidCod Exit EndFor Endif EndSub Sub 'aplicataxapadrao' &NfsPerISS = &CnaeItmTax &NfsPerCofins = &CnaeItmTaxCofins &NfsPerIR = &CnaeItmTaxIR &NfsPerCPP = &CnaeItmTaxCPP &NfsPerPIS = &CnaeItmTaxpIS &NfsPerINSS = &CnaeItmTaxInsS &NfsPerCSLL = &CnaeItmTaxCSLL &NfsPerOut = &CnaeItmTaxOut Do 'SalvarDados' EndSub Sub 'Sair' Do CAse Case &DeOndeVem = 'WWMENSALIDADES' WWMENSALIDADES.Link() case &DeOndeVem = 'WWORCAMENTO' WWORCAMENTO.Link() case&DeOndeVem = 'WWPEDIDOVENDA' WWPEDIDOVENDA.Link() CAse &DeOndeVem = 'WWPEDIDOBALCAO' wwPedidoBalcao.Link() CAse &DeOndeVem = 'FECHAMENTOBALCAO' wpPedidoPedido_Fechado.Link('WWPEDIDOBALCAO', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod) case &DeOndeVem= 'WWOFICINAMECANICA' WWOFICINAMECANICA.Link() otherwise dashboard.Link() EndCAse EndSub Sub 'TotalizaNota' For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod &NfsTotBasCofins = NfsTotBasCofins &NfsTotBasPIS = NfsTotBasPIS &NfsTotISS = NfsTotISS &NfsTotCofins = NfsTotCofins &NfsTotIR = NfsTotIR &NfsTotCPP = NfsTotCPP &NfsTotPIS = NfsTotPIS &NfsTotINSS = NfsTotINSS &NfsTotCSLL = NfsTotCSLL &NfsTotOut = NfsTotOut &NfsTotDesc = NfsTotDesc &NfsTotSer = NfsTotSer &NfsTotDesc_Nac = NfsTotDesc &NfsTotSer_Nac = NfsTotSer Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'TotalizaServico' &NfsTotSer_Nac = &NfsItmValTot-&NfsTotDesc_Nac EndSub Sub 'SalvarDados' //&NfsPerISS = &CnaeItmTax // &NfsPerCofins = &CnaeItmTaxCofins // &NfsPerIR = &CnaeItmTaxIR // &NfsPerCPP = &CnaeItmTaxCPP // &NfsPerPIS = &CnaeItmTaxpIS // &NfsPerINSS = &CnaeItmTaxInsS // &NfsPerCSLL = &CnaeItmTaxCSLL // &NfsPerOut = &CnaeItmTaxOut // //SALVAR CAPA &wpNFSData.Capa.NfsIntIs = false //FIXO POR HORA // &wpNFSData.Capa.NfsIntCliCod = &NfsIntCliCod &wpNFSData.Capa.NfsCliCod = &NfsCliCod &wpNFSData.Capa.NfsFilCod = &NewNfsFilCod &wpNFSData.Capa.NfsDtaEms = Serverdate() &wpNFSData.Capa.NfsPedFilCod = &FilCod &wpNFSData.Capa.NfsPedCod = &PedCod &wpNFSData.Capa.NfsLctCod = &NfsLctCod &wpNFSData.Capa.NfsPrsCidCod= &NfsPrsCidCod prcGravaCApaNFSECapa.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod, &wpNFSData) //SALVA CNAE &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.CnaeDesc = &CnaeDesc &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.CnaeItmDesc = &CnaeItmDesc if &NfsTipNF = 'S' &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.NfsNbs = &NfsNbs &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.NfsTribNac = &NfsTribNac &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.NfsDisSer = &NfsDisSerNacional Else &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.NfsDisSer = &NfsDisSer &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.CnaeItmTax = &CnaeItmTax &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.NfsCnaeSer = &NfsCnaeSer &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.NfsCNAE = &NfsCNAE Endif &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.NfsTotSer = &NfsTotSer_Nac &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.NfsTotDesc = &NfsTotDesc_Nac &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.NfsItmValTot = &NfsItmValTot &wpNFSData.DadosNFSE.NfsInfComp = &NfsInfComp prcGravaDadosNFSe.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod, &wpNFSData) //SALVAR VALORES &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotBasCofins = &NfsTotBasCofins &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotBasPIS = &NfsTotBasPIS if &NfsTipNF = 'S' &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotDesc = &NfsTotDesc_Nac Else &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotDesc = &NfsTotDesc Endif &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotSer = &NfsTotSer &wpNFSData.Totais.SolCod = &SolCod &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotISS = &NfsTotISS &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotCofins = &NfsTotCofins &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotIR = &NfsTotIR &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotCPP = &NfsTotCPP &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotPIS = &NfsTotPIS &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotINSS = &NfsTotINSS &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotCSLL = &NfsTotCSLL &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotOut = &NfsTotOut &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerISS = &NfsPerISS &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerCofins = &NfsPerCofins &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerIR = &NfsPerIR &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerCPP = &NfsPerCPP &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerPIS = &NfsPerPIS &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerINSS = &NfsPerINSS &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerCSLL = &NfsPerCSLL &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerOut = &NfsPerOut &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsRetISS = &NfsRetISS &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsRetCofins = &NfsRetCofins &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsRetIR = &NfsRetIR &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsRetCPP = &NfsRetCPP &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsRetPIS = &NfsRetPIS &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsRetINSS = &NfsRetINSS &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsRetCSLL = &NfsRetCSLL &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsRetOut = &NfsRetOut &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotCofins_Nac = &NfsTotCofins_Nac &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerCofins_Nac = &NfsPerCofins_Nac &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotPIS_Nac = &NfsTotPIS_Nac &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerPIS_Nac = &NfsPerPIS_Nac &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsTotISS_Nac = &NfsTotISS_Nac &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerISS_Nac = &NfsPerISS_Nac &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerCSLL_Nac = &NfsPerCSLL_Nac &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerIR_Nac = &NfsPerIR_Nac &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsPerCPP_Nac = &NfsPerCPP_Nac &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsRetISSNov = &NfsRetISSNov &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsCstPisCofins = &NfsCstPisCofins &wpNFSData.Totais.NfsRetPisCofins = &NfsRetPisCofins prcGravaTotaisNFs.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod, &wpNFSData) do 'TotalizaNota' EndSub Sub 'GetCliente' For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &NfsCliCod &NfsCliRaz = PesRaz &PedCliObs = PesObsCli if &TCon207_CidadePadraoPrestacao = 'C' //Padrao Cliente &NfsPrsCidCod = PesCidCod do 'getCidade' Endif Exit EndFor padraousuarioHora.Call('L', '#ISSRETIDO#', &NfsCliCod, &EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMOd, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') if not &PadObs.IsEmpty() if &NfsTipNF = 'S' &NfsRetISSNov.FromString(Substr(&PadObs, 1, 1)) &NfsRetPisCofins.FromString(Substr(&PadObs, 2, 1)) // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetIR = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetCPP = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetPIS = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetINSS = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetCSLL = true , '1', '0') // &PadObs += iif(&NfsRetOut = true, '1', '0') Else &NfsRetISS = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 1, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetCofins = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 2, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetIR = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 3, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetCPP = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 4, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetPIS = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 5, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetINSS = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 6, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetCSLL = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 7, 1) = '1', true, false) &NfsRetOut = iif(Substr(&PadObs, 8, 1) = '1', true, false) Endif Endif do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndSub Sub 'loadCnaeServico' &IsErroCnaeServico = false &CnaeItmDesc = '' tbINSS.Visible = 0 tbCofins.Visible = 0 tbIR.Visible = 0 tbcpP.Visible = 0 tbpiS.Visible = 0 tbINSS.Visible = 0 tbCsLL.Visible = 0 tbOutras.Visible = 0 tbRTB.Visible = 0 For Each ORder EmpCod, CnaeCod, CnaeItmCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CnaeCod = &NfsCNAE Where CnaeFilCod= &NewNfsFilCod Where CnaeItmCod = &NfsCnaeSer If CnaeSts <> status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO &CnaeItmDesc = 'INATIVO ' &IsErroCnaeServico = true EndIf &CnaeItmDesc += CnaeItmDesc &CnaeItmTax = CnaeItmTax &CnaeItmTaxOut = CnaeItmTaxOut &CnaeItmTaxCSLL = CnaeItmTaxCSLL &CnaeItmTaxINSS = CnaeItmTaxINSS &CnaeItmTaxPIS = CnaeItmTaxPIS &CnaeItmTaxCPP = CnaeItmTaxCPP &CnaeItmTaxIR = CnaeItmTaxIR &CnaeItmTaxCofins = CnaeItmTaxCofins RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(trim(toformattedString(CnaeItmTax)), &varCnaeItmTax) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(trim(toformattedString(CnaeItmTaxCofins)), &varCnaeItmTaxCofins) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(trim(toformattedString(CnaeItmTaxIR)), &varCnaeItmTaxIR) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(trim(toformattedString(CnaeItmTaxCPP)), &varCnaeItmTaxCPP) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(trim(toformattedString(CnaeItmTaxPIS)), &varCnaeItmTaxPIS) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(trim(toformattedString(CnaeItmTaxINSS)), &varCnaeItmTaxINSS) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(trim(toformattedString(CnaeItmTaxCSLL)), &varCnaeItmTaxCSLL) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(trim(toformattedString(CnaeItmTaxOut)), &varCnaeItmTaxOut ) tbINSS.Visible = CnaeItmTax > 0 tbCofins.Visible = CnaeItmTaxCofins > 0 tbIR.Visible = CnaeItmTaxIR > 0 tbcpP.Visible = CnaeItmTaxCPP > 0 tbpiS.Visible = CnaeItmTaxPIS > 0 tbINSS.Visible = CnaeItmTaxINSS > 0 tbCsLL.Visible = CnaeItmTaxCSLL > 0 tbOutras.Visible = CnaeItmTaxOut > 0 tbRTB.Visible = CnaeDtaHorUltMod < &CnaedtaHorUltMod or CnaeDtaHorUltMod.IsEmpty() or CnaeDtaHorUltMod.IsNull() Exit When none &CnaeItmDesc = 'SERVICO NAO LOCALIZADO' &IsErroCnaeServico = true EndFor EndSub Sub 'loadCNAE' &IsErroCnae = false &CnaeDesc = '' For Each ORder EmpCod, CnaeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CnaeCod = &NfsCNAE If CnaeSts <> status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO &CnaeDesc = 'INATIVO ' &IsErroCnae = true EndIf &CnaeDesc += CnaeDesc Exit When none &CnaeDesc = 'CNAE NAO LOCALIZADO' &IsErroCnae = true EndFor EndSub Sub 'AtivaInativa' tbIntermediario.Visible = (&NfsIntIs = true) EndSub Sub 'Nbs' &IsErroNBS = false For Each ORder NcmCod Where NcmCod = &NfsNbs Where NCMTip = '1' &NcmObs = NcmDes Exit when none &IsErroNBS = true &NcmObs = 'CÓDIGO NBS NÃO CADASTRADO/INVÁLIDO!' EndFor EndSub Sub 'TipoServico' &TipSerNbsPad = 0 &IsErroTipoServico = false For Each Order TipSerCod Where TipSerCod = &NfsTribNac &TipSerNom = TipSerNom For Each ORder TipSerCod, TipSerItmCod Where TipSerEmpCod = &EmpCod &TipSerNbsPad = TipSerNbsPad Exit EndFor Exit When none &IsErroTipoServico = true &TipSerNom = 'TIPO SERVIÇO NÃO INFORMADO/INVÁLIDO' EndFor EndSub Sub 'loadServico' For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod if NfsIsEnv = true do 'Sair' EndIf &NfsTipNF = NfsTipNF &NfsTribNac = NfsTribNac &NfsNbs = NfsNbs &NfsDisSerNacional = NfsDisSer &NfsInfComp = NfsInfComp //Total ISS &NfsTotISS_Nac = NfsTotISS &NfsPerISS_Nac = NfsPerISS &NfsRetISSNov = NfsRetISSNov &NfsCstPisCofins = NfsCstPisCofins &NfsRetPisCofins = NfsRetPisCofins &NfsPerCSLL_Nac = NfsPerCSLL &NfsPerCPP_Nac = NfsPerCPP &NfsPerIR_Nac = NfsPerIR &NfsTotCofins_Nac = NfsTotCofins &NfsPerCofins_Nac = NfsPerCofins &NfsTotPIS_Nac = NfsTotPIS &NfsPerPIS_Nac = NfsPerPIS &NfsTotDesc_Nac = NfsTotDesc &NfsItmValTot = NfsTotSer tbAliquotasPisCofins.Visible = (NfsCstPisCofins <> PisCofinsServico.CST00 and (not NfsCstPisCofins.IsEmpty() and not NfsCstPisCofins.IsNull())) &NewNfsFilCod = NfsFilCod &NfsIntIs = NfsIntIs &NfsDisSer = NfsDisSer &NfsCnaeSer = NfsCnaeSer &NfsCNAE = NfsCNAE &NfsIntCliCod = NfsIntCliCod &NfsIntRaz = NfsIntRaz &NfsCliCod = NfsCliCod &NfsCliRaz = NfsCliRaz &NfsTotBasCofins = NfsTotBasCofins &NfsTotBasPIS = NfsTotBasPIS &NfsTotISS = NfsTotISS &NfsTotCofins = NfsTotCofins &NfsTotIR = NfsTotIR &NfsTotCPP = NfsTotCPP &NfsTotPIS = NfsTotPIS &NfsTotINSS = NfsTotINSS &NfsTotCSLL = NfsTotCSLL &NfsTotOut = NfsTotCSLL &NfsPerISS = NfsPerISS &NfsPerCofins = NfsPerCofins &NfsPerIR = NfsPerCofins &NfsPerCPP = NfsPerCPP &NfsPerPIS = NfsPerPIS &NfsPerINSS = NfsPerINSS &NfsPerCSLL = NfsPerCSLL &NfsPerOut = NfsPerOut &NfsTotDesc = NfsTotDesc &NfsTotSer = NfsTotSer &NfsRetISS = NfsRetISS &NfsRetCofins = NfsRetCofins &NfsRetIR = NfsRetIR &NfsRetCPP = NfsRetCPP &NfsRetPIS = NfsRetPIS &NfsRetINSS = NfsRetINSS &NfsRetCSLL = NfsRetCSLL &NfsRetOut = NfsRetOut &NfsPrsCidCod = NfsPrsCidCod &NfsLctCod = NfsLctCod Exit EndFor if &PedCod > 0 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod &PedCliObs = PedCliObs &PedObsGer = PedObsGer &PedObsEst = PedObsEst &NfsLctCod = LctCod &PedCliCidCod = PedCliCidCod Exit EndFor EndIf do 'carregaTipolancamento' &NfsLctCod = &TCon208_TipoLctPadraoNFSe If &TCon207_CidadePadraoPrestacao <> 'C' if &NfsPrsCidCod.IsEmpty() do 'cidadeFilial' Else do 'getCidade' EndIf Else if &NfsPrsCidCod.IsEmpty() &NfsPrsCidCod = &PedCliCidCod Endif do 'getCidade' Endif do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndSub Sub 'carregaTipolancamento' &NfsLctCod.Clear() &NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &NfeFin = NotaFinalidade.EmissaoNormal DpTipoLancamentoNota.Call(&EmpCod, &NfeFin, &NfeEntSai, &SdtTipoLancamento) For &SdtTipoLancamentoItem in &SdtTipoLancamento &NfsLctCod.AddItem(&SdtTipoLancamentoItem.LctCod, &SdtTipoLancamentoItem.LctCodNom) EndFor EndSub
